competitors.title: Beyond the Chatbot: Event-Driven Agents in Action
key_points: Docker used Mastra to build event-driven agents that respond to GitHub webhooks
Mastra chosen as agentic framework for multi-agent flows and conditional workflows
Integration with Docker MCP Gateway and GitHub Official MCP server
Three sub-agents architecture: analyze PR, generate comment, post and close PR
TypeScript-based framework support for JavaScript-native developers
competitors.unique_angle: Real-world enterprise case study from Docker showing event-driven (not chat-driven) agent architecture

competitors.title: Building an agentic RAG assistant with JavaScript, Mastra and Elasticsearch
key_points: Mastra wraps LLM with backend infrastructure and exposes it as an API endpoint
Framework comparison: Mastra vs CrewAI, AutoGen, LangGraph
Mastra provides interface for defining tools, system prompts, and agent behavior
Vite + React frontend + Mastra backend + Elasticsearch for RAG
Model-agnostic: works with any Mastra-compatible model provider
competitors.unique_angle: Focus on agentic RAG specifically with Elasticsearch integration and why Mastra over Python frameworks

competitors.title: Mastra: The AI Framework That Changes Everything
key_points: Mastra AI is a TypeScript framework for building custom AI agents with tools, memory, and MCP servers
Comparison with Claude Agent SDK
Build agents with memory management, API integration, and custom tools
Practical financial agent example
14K+ YouTube views, 482 likes
competitors.unique_angle: Video comparison format - Mastra vs Claude Agent SDK, practical hands-on tutorial style

competitors.title: Building an RLM with Mastra: Introducing mastra-rlm-kit
key_points: Implements Recursive Language Models (RLMs) on top of Mastra
Mastra already has workflows, observability, and strong TypeScript ergonomics
createRlmTool(), createRlmWorkflow(), createRlmRunner() APIs
Paper-faithful recursive sub-queries with Python code execution
Deterministic artifacts: output, events, audit log, recursion tree
competitors.unique_angle: Advanced reasoning architecture (RLM) built on Mastra; focuses on solving the agents are bad at thinking problem

competitors.title: We raised a $22M Series A to help every developer build agents
key_points: Mastra raised $22M Series A led by Spark Capital, total funding $35M
Founded by Gatsby team, 18 months from launch to Series A
Enterprises using Mastra: Brex, Sanity, Factorial, Indeed, Marsh McLennan, MongoDB, Workday, Salesforce, Docker, Replit, Elastic, SoftBank, Plaid
Marsh McLennan agent used by 100k+ people daily
Brex agents helped drive $5.1B Capital One acquisition
competitors.unique_angle: Official announcement with funding data and major enterprise adoption metrics

stats.stat: Mastra has 23.2k GitHub stars as of April 2026
Mastra raised $22M Series A led by Spark Capital, total funding $35M
60-70% of YC X25 agent startups are building their AI agents in TypeScript
stats.source: Sam Bhagwat (Mastra CEO) via Hacker News

stats.stat: Marsh McLennan enterprise search built with Mastra used by 100k+ people every day
Brex agents built with Mastra helped drive their $5.1B Capital One acquisition
Mastra has 14,334 commits and 1,079 branches on GitHub
Better Stack Mastra video has 14K+ views on YouTube
Mastra Platform pricing starts at free tier (Starter), Teams at $250/team/month
Mastra founded by the team behind Gatsby, the popular JavaScript framework

angles.angle: Hands-on tutorial: Build your first production-ready AI agent with Mastra in 30 minutes
angles.reason: Most existing articles are overview/comparison pieces or enterprise case studies. A step-by-step tutorial from zero to deployed agent fills a major content gap.

angles.angle: Mastra vs LangGraph vs CrewAI: TypeScript-first AI framework comparison
angles.reason: The Elastic article touches on framework comparison briefly, but a dedicated TypeScript-first comparison would capture developers evaluating options.

angles.angle: From Python to TypeScript: Why AI agent development is shifting to the JS ecosystem
angles.reason: The industry shift from Python to TypeScript for AI agents is trending. The HN stat about YC startups and the Python trains, TypeScript ships tagline provide strong hooks.

angles.angle: Mastra MCP integration: Connecting your agents to any tool or API
angles.reason: MCP is a hot topic in 2025-2026. Docker use of MCP Gateway with Mastra shows real-world value, but no dedicated tutorial exists.

angles.angle: Building multi-agent workflows with Mastra: Real-world patterns and best practices
angles.reason: Docker 3-agent architecture is the only real example. A deep dive into workflow patterns would address a content gap.
